column9: They just (walk) in the park and look rested.
column10: I wondered what he (do) since we last met?
column11: There (be) no post all this week. The postman (fall) ill.
column12: Nick hoped there (be) no post since Friday.
column13: Caroline looked very brown. She (be) to the Bahamas.
column14: When I got to Jack’s house the police were there. Someone (steal) his car.
column15: I found a baby bird in our garden. It (fall) out of its nest.
column16: Tom’s father (be) an architect for twenty years.
column17: The Browns (arrive)? – Tom said they (arrive) 40 minutes before. Why you (come) so late?
